name: Slow-Cooker Enchiladas

method: Take a skillet and heat oil over the medium heat. Then, add beef and
cook for 3-5 minutes. Crumble the beef, and drain any excess fat,
Add corn, black beans, green chiles, salsa, enchilada sauce, and taco

Place one-third of beef mixture on top of it, and sprinkle with a half

Put tortilla, cheese, and enchilada sauce.
